description: In this episode of the Binance Podcast, host Jared Wynn speaks with Bruce Fenton, CEO of Atlantic Financial, about his journey in the financial sector and the impact of COVID-19 on the economy. Bruce shares insights from his early experiences in trading and his transition into the cryptocurrency space, highlighting the evolution of technology and investment strategies over the years. [t=9:76] [t=19:84] [t=147:86]
topic_summary: Jared Wynn interviews Bruce Fenton on his financial career, experiences with cryptocurrency, and the effects of COVID-19 on the economy. The discussion covers Bruce's early trading experiences and his insights into emerging markets and technology. [t=9:76] [t=19:84] [t=147:86]
